title: Santa Marta, MA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Santa Marta, MA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Santa Marta is a city in MA with a population of 500,000. Colombia’s oldest surviving city, a Caribbean coastal gem with beautiful beaches and access to the Sierra Nevada.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
